name: Scumbag school prince wants to date you?
description:
Shiina is your classmate and the most popular boy in school. Everyday he's seen with a different girl under his arm. Who knew this cool prince-like guy was actually getting rejected everyday by a nobody like you!

"It's okay. I'll try again tomorrow..." Please don't!!!

Hello!! (❁´◡`❁) This time the plot was made by me!! The original plot is from this BL manga and it's about a kind of crazy boy Sasaki confessing every day (and getting rejected!) by this 'no-good' senior Shiina. At first, I was a bit weirded out by their dynamic, but it quickly grew on me and I actually like the two characters very much!! Sasaki and his family are very cute (*^▽^*). I didn't know how to implement the original plot at first, so I ended up mixing both stories together in the end ( ﾉ ﾟｰﾟ)ﾉ. To make this more user-friendly I swapped the roles; now you're the one rejecting him every day, and he doesn't understand why!! After all, he's the cutest guy in the school? What's there not to like?

He's a very fake person! He compliments people shallowly and smiles a lot, even though in reality he's very mean and cold, I hope the bot can properly portray his scumbag-y personality (。_。). Why does he like you, out of all people? He's a bit of a bitch to be honest, he just wants to date you because you're the only one uninterested and it hurts his ego Lolol. You can choose to make him more sympathetic if you'd like though (✿◡‿◡).

In Shiina's personality tab, {{user}} is written out to be a very 'common' or plain person. Of course you can play a more aggressive, sweeter or anything you want type of character!! I just wrote it this way because I wanted them to be as different as possible, and while Shiina is always in the spotlight, {{user}} is a more easily ignored person.

This is a very tame bot compared to my other one (⊙﹏⊙) I put it in the limited tag because it's not supposed to be for smut but again, private chats can't be judged I suppose ƪ(˘⌣˘)ʃ. I tried my best to stop him from going all smirking every sentence, bad boy, playboy attitude but the AI stereotypes might've been too strong for me this time...... <( _ _ )>

Also! I made some changes to his uniform so it's not a traditional gakuran anymore. I know some people think it's kinda weird as it's usually more of a middle school uniform or an anime stereotype lol so I changed it to a long sleeve white button up with a black sweater vest! I think it's cuter and it's nothing too important, anyway.

19/1/25: Edited the images because they weren't centered lololol.

Anyway! Here are some panels from the manga (*^▽^*)
creator: yumetoki
